schema.ion.id › trade › offer › v1

trade/offer/v1

Pack IRI: https://schema.ion.id/trade/offer/v1#  |  Layer: L5 — Trade sector  |  Version: v1

context.jsonld attributes.yaml vocab.jsonld

Schemas in this pack

TradeOfferAttributes

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/trade/offer/v1#TradeOfferAttributes

PropertyMandatoryDescription
cancellationPolicyalwaysION standard cancellation policy IRI. cancel.prepacked.free: buyer may cancel before packed at no fee. cancel.mto.nofee.
cancellationAllowedReasonsconditionalSeller-declared reasons for which buyer cancellation is accepted. Only meaningful when cancellationPolicy is not cancel.
returnablealwaysWhether the product can be returned after delivery. False for perishables, personalised items, digital goods, and hygien
returnPolicyalwaysION standard return policy IRI. Encodes window duration and who pays return shipping.
sellerPickupReturnconditionalWhether the seller arranges pickup for returns (true) or consumer must arrange their own return shipping (false).
warrantyPolicyalwaysION standard warranty policy IRI.
disputePolicyalwaysION standard dispute resolution policy IRI. dispute.consumer.bpsk: B2C — BPSK (Badan Penyelesaian Sengketa Konsumen). di
timeToShipalwaysTime from order confirm to when seller hands package to logistics. ISO 8601 duration.
availableOnCodalwaysWhether Cash on Delivery is available for this product. Some categories cannot be sold on COD (prescription medicine, al
selfPickupOtpoptionalWhether OTP verification is required when consumer picks up order. If true, BPP generates deliveryOtp in performanceAttr
selfPickupInstructionsoptionalInstructions for self-pickup — counter number, floor, collection point.
proofOfDeliveryTypeoptionalType of delivery confirmation proof required.
contactDetailsConsumerCarealwaysConsumer care contact in comma-separated format: name, email, phone. Displayed to consumer for post-purchase support que
displayLanguagealwaysLanguages in which this offer's catalog content is available. "id" always present. "en" required for XB commerce pattern
minimumOrderQuantityconditionalMinimum quantity for B2B wholesale. count for unit-based, measure for weight/volume-based products.
weightSlabsconditionalWeight-based pricing tiers for catalogued logistics offers.
offerTypeoptionalType of commercial offer.
priceModeloptionalHow pricing is determined for this offer.
minBasketAmountoptionalMinimum basket value in IDR for offer to be valid.
maxDiscountAmountoptionalMaximum discount cap in IDR for percentage offers.
voucherCodeoptionalVoucher or promo code to activate offer.
stackableoptionalWhether this offer can be combined with other active offers.
usageLimitPerUseroptionalMaximum times this offer can be used by a single user.
customerSegmentoptionalSegment of customers eligible for this offer.
paymentMethodEligibilityoptionalStructured payment method eligibility. Each entry declares minAmount/maxAmount constraints, required buyer tier, exclude
subsidyBreakupoptionalWho funds the discount/promotion.
startAtoptionalWhen this promotional offer becomes active.
endAtoptionalWhen this promotional offer expires.
priceValidFromoptionalStart of price validity window. Distinct from startAt (offer availability window) — price may change mid-campaign while
priceValidUntiloptionalEnd of price validity window.
priceChangeScheduleoptionalFull price change timeline for a campaign. BAPs MUST render countdown UI and compute correct price at transaction time.
reservationWindowSecondsoptionalSeconds for which the BPP will hold availability and the on_select price quote. Default 300. BPP soft-reserves at on_sel
totalStockCapoptionalAbsolute total quantity available under this offer. When reached, all subsequent /select calls return ION-3008. Distinct
perUserQuantityCapoptionalMaximum units a single buyer can purchase under this offer across all transactions (enforced by BPP). Distinct from usag
isFlashSaleoptionalSignals this offer is a flash sale. BAP surfaces urgency UI; reservationWindowSeconds SHOULD be short (60-180s).
queueEnabledoptionalWhether BPP uses a queue/throttle mechanism when demand exceeds supply. When true, on_select may return queuePosition.
queuePositionconditionalConsumer's current position in the purchase queue. 0 = at front. Returned in on_select when queueEnabled=true.
estimatedWaitSecondsconditionalEstimated wait time before this consumer reaches front of queue.
stackingGroupoptionalVoucher stacking group. Vouchers from different groups stack by default. Within a single group only one voucher can appl
stackingRulesoptionalExplicit voucher stacking rules. Used when offer has complex combination logic beyond the default group rules.
codEligibilityForBuyerconditionalBPP-evaluated COD eligibility for the specific buyer in this transaction. Returned in on_select. Distinct from available
codEligibilityReasonconditionalReason for the codEligibilityForBuyer decision.
returnEvidenceRequirementconditionalEvidence required from buyer when initiating a return. VIDEO_UNBOXING_REQUIRED is standard for high-value electronics. P
returnEvidenceMinPhotosconditionalMinimum number of evidence photos required.
handlingTimeHoursoptionalHours from order confirm to package ready for logistics. Replaces QSR-only averagePreparationTime for non-food sellers.
grievanceSlaPolicyalwaysION Grievance SLA policy IRI. Declares response time, resolution time, escalation path, and penalty consequences when SL
paymentTermsPolicyalwaysPayment terms policy IRI. Declares when payment is collected, which methods are accepted, whether deposit or credit term
penaltyPolicyconditionalPenalty policy IRI. Normally inferred from seller's onboarding tier (Standard/Mall/Premium) and other declared policies
customTermsAddendumoptionalFree-text addendum for edge cases (e.g. watchmaker offering lifetime service). Supplements the declared policy IRIs but

Pack README

trade/offer/v1

Terms of sale — cancellation, returns, warranties, COD, promotions.

Attaches to

`beckn:Offer.offerAttributes`

Policy IRIs

ION uses IRI-encoded policy identifiers for canonical terms:

Return policies

  • `ion://policy/return.7d.sellerpays` — 7-day return, seller arranges pickup
  • `ion://policy/return.15d.sellerpays` — 15-day return, seller pays
  • `ion://policy/return.7d.buyerpays` — 7-day return, buyer ships back
  • `ion://policy/return/standard/none` — no returns

    • Cancellation policies

  • `ion://policy/cancel/prepacked/free` — free cancellation before packed
  • `ion://policy/cancel/mto/nofee-before-prepare` — MTO free before preparation
  • `ion://policy/cancel/standard/none` — no cancellation

    • Warranty policies

  • `ion://policy/warranty.1y.manufacturer`
  • `ion://policy/warranty.2y.manufacturer`
  • `ion://policy/warranty/standard/none`

    • Dispute policies

  • `ion://policy/dispute/consumer/bpsk` — B2C via BPSK
  • `ion://policy/dispute/commercial/bani` — B2B via BANI arbitration
    • Part of schema.ion.id — ION Network vocabulary. Built from schema/extensions/trade/offer/v1/ in the ion-network spec. Generated 2026-04-24 19:01 UTC.
